---
title: "Interactive who-infected-whom visualization software"
---

## Authors

## Affiliations

## Corresponding Author


# Introduction

this is the introduction to this amazing paper.
results
[@smith2020]. Reproducible software workflows are also increasingly
important for computational research [@berling2021].

# Methods

athis is a test of a figure @fig-test and we see.

![Overview figure for testing](figures/test.png){#fig-test width=80%}

This is where we describe the methods for unknonw infections and os on...

## Data

# Results

# Discussion


# Acknowledgements

# References
